choose.when: AND O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'N' AND ( NVL(ST.DELIVERY_YN, 'N') = 'Y' OR NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') = '배송완료' )

where.if: AND ( O.ORDERER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(O.ORDER_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR PD.PRODUCT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.sql: FROM ORDERS O LEFT JOIN DELIVERY D ON O.ORDER_ID = D.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT S.DELIVERY_ID, S.DELIVERY_YN, S.DELIVERY_STATUS FROM STATUS S WHERE S.DNUM = ( SELECT MAX(S2.DNUM) FROM STATUS S2 WHERE S2.DELIVERY_ID = S.DELIVERY_ID ) ) ST ON D.DELIVERY_ID = ST.DELIVERY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT X.ORDER_ID, X.PRODUCT_NAME, X.PRODUCT_PRICE, X.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, X.COMPANY_NAME, X.COMPANY_PHONE, X.COMPANY_ADDRESS FROM ( SELECT OD.ORDER_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, C.COMPANY_NAME, C.COMPANY_PHONE, C.ADDRESS_ADDRESS AS COMPANY_ADDRESS, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OD.ORDER_ID ORDER BY OD.DETAIL_ID) AS RN FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN PRODUCT P ON OD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE ) X WHERE X.RN = 1 ) PD ON O.ORDER_ID = PD.ORDER_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT ORDER_ID, ORDERER_NAME, ORDERER_PHONE, ORDER_TOTAL_PRICE, ORDER_DATE_STR, ORDER_CANCEL_YN, CANCEL_STATUS, CANCEL_STATUS_LABEL, DELIVERY_YN, DELIVERY_STATUS, ORDER_STATUS_LABEL, DELIVERY_ID, EXPECTED_DATE_STR, RECV_NAME, RECV_PHONE, RECV_ADDRESS, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCT_PHOTO1, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_PHONE, COMPANY_ADDRESS FROM ( SELECT O.ORDER_ID, O.ORDERER_NAME, O.ORDERER_PHONE, O.ORDER_TOTAL_PRICE, TO_CHAR(O.ORDER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ORDER_DATE_STR, O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN, NVL(O.CANCEL_STATUS, '') AS CANCEL_STATUS, CASE WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'PENDING' THEN '취소요청' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN '취소완료' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN '취소거절' ELSE '정상' END AS CANCEL_STATUS_LABEL, NVL(ST.DELIVERY_YN, 'N') AS DELIVERY_YN, NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') AS DELIVERY_STATUS, CASE WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'PENDING' THEN '취소 요청' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN '취소 완료' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN '취소 반려' WHEN NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') = '배송완료' THEN '배송완료' WHEN NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') = '배송중' THEN '배송 중' WHEN NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') = '출고완료' THEN '출고 완료' ELSE '결제 완료' END AS ORDER_STATUS_LABEL, NVL(D.DELIVERY_ID, 0) AS DELIVERY_ID, TO_CHAR(D.EXPECTED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXPECTED_DATE_STR, O.RECV_NAME, O.RECV_PHONE, O.RECV_ADDRESS, NVL(PD.PRODUCT_NAME, '상품 정보 없음') AS PRODUCT_NAME, NVL(PD.PRODUCT_PRICE, 0) AS PRODUCT_PRICE, PD.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, PD.COMPANY_NAME, PD.COMPANY_PHONE, PD.COMPANY_ADDRESS,
O.ORDER_DATE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY O.ORDER_ID ORDER BY O.ORDER_DATE DESC, NVL(D.DELIVERY_ID, 0) DESC ) AS RN
) WHERE RN = 1
ORDER BY ORDER_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DELIVERY ( DELIVERY_ID, ORDER_ID, COURIER, EXPECTED_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_DELIVERY.NEXTVAL, #{orderId}, NULL, NULL )
INSERT INTO STATUS ( DNUM, DELIVERY_YN, DELIVERY_STATUS, DELIVERY_ID ) VALUES ( RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID()), #{deliveryYn}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryId} )

sql.where:
AND O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y'
AND O.CANCEL_REQUEST_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND O.CANCEL_REQUEST_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND NVL(O.CANCEL_STATUS, 'PENDING') = 'PENDING'
AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = #{cancelStatus}
AND ( O.ORDERER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(O.ORDER_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR P.PRODUCT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT O.ORDER_ID) FROM ORDERS O LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON O.ORDER_ID = OD.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN PRODUCT P ON OD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT O.ORDER_ID, O.ORDERER_NAME, NVL(P.PRODUCT_NAME, '상품 정보 없음') AS PRODUCT_NAME, NVL(O.CANCEL_REASON, '-') AS CANCEL_REASON,
O.CANCEL_REQUEST_DATE AS CANCEL_REQUEST_DATE, TO_CHAR(O.CANCEL_REQUEST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CANCEL_REQUEST_DATE_STR,
O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN, NVL(O.CANCEL_STATUS, 'PENDING') AS CANCEL_STATUS,
CASE WHEN NVL(O.CANCEL_STATUS, 'PENDING') = 'APPROVED' THEN '취소 승인' WHEN NVL(O.CANCEL_STATUS, 'PENDING') = 'REJECTED' THEN '취소 반려' ELSE '승인 대기' END AS CANCEL_STATUS_LABEL,
NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '준비중') AS DELIVERY_STATUS,
CASE WHEN O.CANCEL_REASON LIKE '단순변심|%' THEN '사용자 귀책' WHEN O.CANCEL_REASON LIKE '주문실수|%' THEN '사용자 귀책' WHEN O.CANCEL_REASON LIKE '상품불량|%' THEN '판매자 귀책' WHEN O.CANCEL_REASON LIKE '오배송|%' THEN '판매자 귀책' WHEN O.CANCEL_REASON LIKE '배송지연|%' THEN '판매자 귀책' ELSE '확인 필요' END AS RESPONSIBILITY_TYPE,
CASE WHEN O.CANCEL_REASON LIKE '단순변심|%' THEN '배송비 부과' WHEN O.CANCEL_REASON LIKE '주문실수|%' THEN '배송비 부과' WHEN O.CANCEL_REASON LIKE '상품불량|%' THEN '배송비 면제' WHEN O.CANCEL_REASON LIKE '오배송|%' THEN '배송비 면제' WHEN O.CANCEL_REASON LIKE '배송지연|%' THEN '배송비 면제' WHEN NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '준비중') IN ('준비중', '결제완료', '상품준비중') THEN '배송비 없음' ELSE '확인 필요' END AS SHIPPING_FEE_POLICY,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY O.ORDER_ID ORDER BY OD.DETAIL_ID ) AS RN
FROM ORDERS O LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON O.ORDER_ID = OD.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN PRODUCT P ON OD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN DELIVERY D ON O.ORDER_ID = D.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT S.DELIVERY_ID, S.DELIVERY_YN, S.DELIVERY_STATUS FROM STATUS S WHERE S.DNUM = ( SELECT MAX(S2.DNUM) FROM STATUS S2 WHERE S2.DELIVERY_ID = S.DELIVERY_ID ) ) ST ON D.DELIVERY_ID = ST.DELIVERY_ID
) WHERE RN = 1 ORDER BY CANCEL_REQUEST_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND NVL(CANCEL_STATUS, 'PENDING') = 'PENDING'
mapper.update: UPDATE ORDERS SET CANCEL_STATUS = 'APPROVED' WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND NVL(CANCEL_STATUS, 'PENDING') = 'PENDING'
UPDATE ORDERS SET CANCEL_STATUS = 'REJECTED' WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND NVL(CANCEL_STATUS, 'PENDING') = 'PENDING'
mapper.select:
SELECT O.ORDER_ID, O.ORDERER_NAME, O.ORDERER_PHONE, O.ORDERER_EMAIL, O.ORDER_MEMO, CASE WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'PENDING' THEN 'REQ_CANCEL' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN 'REQ_CANCEL' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN 'REQ_CANCEL' WHEN NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') = '배송완료' THEN 'DONE' WHEN NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') = '배송중' THEN 'SHIP' WHEN NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') = '출고완료' THEN 'OUT' ELSE 'PAY' END AS ORDER_STATUS, O.ORDER_TOTAL_PRICE, TO_CHAR(O.ORDER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ORDER_DATE_STR, O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN, NVL(O.CANCEL_STATUS, '') AS CANCEL_STATUS, CASE WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'PENDING' THEN '취소요청' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN '취소완료' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN '취소거절' ELSE '정상' END AS CANCEL_STATUS_LABEL, CASE WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'PENDING' THEN '취소 요청' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN '취소 완료' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN '취소 반려' WHEN NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') = '배송완료' THEN '배송완료' WHEN NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') = '배송중' THEN '배송 중' WHEN NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') = '출고완료' THEN '출고 완료' ELSE '결제 완료' END AS ORDER_STATUS_LABEL, CASE WHEN NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') = '배송완료' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DELIVERY_YN, NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '결제완료') AS DELIVERY_STATUS, NVL(D.DELIVERY_ID, 0) AS DELIVERY_ID, TO_CHAR(D.EXPECTED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXPECTED_DATE_STR, O.RECV_NAME, O.RECV_PHONE, O.RECV_ADDRESS, NVL(PD.PRODUCT_NAME, '상품 정보 없음') AS PRODUCT_NAME, NVL(PD.PRODUCT_PRICE, 0) AS PRODUCT_PRICE, PD.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, PD.COMPANY_NAME, PD.COMPANY_PHONE, PD.COMPANY_ADDRESS
WHERE O.ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ORDERS SET ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'N', CANCEL_STATUS = NULL WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
